column1: Jacob Wilson leads the slate with a strong combination of top lineup placement, steady hit rates, and a favorable home matchup against Kyle Freeland, who has allowed consistent contact to righties. Shea Langeliers also offers reliability in the heart of the order with a similar platoon edge and recent uptick in hits. Jeremy Pena and Bobby Witt Jr. bring platoon advantages and high game-to-game consistency, while Luis Arraez remains a dependable option thanks to his elite contact skills and recent hot stretch.
